prompt_text: How do I connect Workable with LinkedIn?
response:
You connect Workable with LinkedIn by linking your **LinkedIn Company Page** in Workable’s settings and then (optionally) enabling any additional LinkedIn integrations you need.[1][2]

Below are the main ways to connect, and how to do each:

---

### 1. Connect your LinkedIn Company Page (for free/basic job posts)

This is the core connection so Workable jobs can appear on your LinkedIn Company Page under the **Jobs** tab.[1][2]

**Prerequisites**

- A **LinkedIn Company Page** (not just personal profiles).[1][2]  
- Your Workable account must be at least **30 days old** to qualify for free visibility on LinkedIn basic jobs.[2]  
- The same LinkedIn Company Page can be linked to **only one** Workable account.[1][2]

**Step A – Create a LinkedIn Company Page (if you don’t have one)**[1]  

1. In LinkedIn, go to the page setup area.  
2. Choose **Company** as the page type.  
3. Fill in company details and click **Create page**.[1]  

**Step B – Connect the page in Workable (two methods)**

You can connect during job posting or from Settings:

**Method 1 – During job publication**[1]  

1. In Workable, go to **Find Candidates** > **Free job boards** when publishing a job.  
2. When prompted, enter your **LinkedIn company name**.  
3. Select the correct match (you can click “View on LinkedIn” to verify).[1]  
4. Click **Connect**.

**Method 2 – From Settings**[1][2]  

1. In Workable, go to **Settings** > **Integrations** > **Apps** > **LinkedIn**.  
2. Click **Enter Company Name**.[1]  
3. In the modal, choose your LinkedIn company page from the suggested matches or use **Other** to search again.[1]  
4. If you still can’t find it, you can enter your **LinkedIn Company ID** instead.[1]  
5. Click **Connect**.

Once connected, **jobs published through Workable are automatically attached to your LinkedIn Company Page (Jobs section)** as basic/free listings.[1][2]

> Note: Starting end of March 2026, LinkedIn requires Company Page admins to enable a setting in LinkedIn that allows **basic jobs** to appear on the page and to select the approved job source within LinkedIn.[1]

---

### 2. Choose which LinkedIn connection options you want

Workable supports several different LinkedIn connection levels; you can use one or several depending on needs.[2]

| Option | What it does | Setup in Workable | Requirements |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **LinkedIn Basic jobs (limited listings)** | Posts your Workable jobs as free/limited listings tied to your Company Page.[2] | Link Company Page under **Settings > Integrations > Apps > LinkedIn** (as above).[1][2] | LinkedIn Company Page; Workable account ≥ 30 days for free visibility.[2] |
| **LinkedIn Recruiter Job Posting (via Contract ID)** | Lets you sponsor jobs through LinkedIn Recruiter slots or PPC from Workable.[2] | Add your **LinkedIn Contract ID** under **Settings > Integrations > Apps > LinkedIn**.[2] | Full LinkedIn Recruiter; not available for Recruiter Lite.[2] |
| **LinkedIn Premium job postings purchased through Workable** | Buy premium LinkedIn job ads directly in Workable.[2] | No extra setup; use **Find Candidates > Premium job boards**.[2] | LinkedIn company profile and a credit card.[2] |
| **LinkedIn Recruiter System Connect (RSC)** | Syncs LinkedIn Recruiter with Workable: status, notes, InMail, profile view.[2][3] | Enable **Recruiter System Connect** under **Settings > Integrations > Apps > LinkedIn**.[2] | Full LinkedIn Recruiter; not available for Recruiter Lite.[2] |
| **LinkedIn Apply Connect** (includes Easy Apply) | Enables **LinkedIn Apply (Easy Apply)**, applicant notifications, and LinkedIn widget in Workable.[2] | Enable **LinkedIn Apply Connect** under **Settings > Integrations > Apps > LinkedIn** by selecting **Manage Integrations**.[2] | Full LinkedIn Recruiter account; not for Recruiter Lite.[2] |

**Key behaviors**

- **Basic jobs / sponsored jobs via integration**: changes in Workable are reflected on LinkedIn **instantly**.[2]  
- **Premium postings bought through Workable**: may take up to **24 hours** to appear, and edits in Workable
